generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor mounted on heatbed for temperature measurement with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring internal air temperature within styrofoam box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring external ambient temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from heatbed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelA, ModelB, ScipyOptimizationPackage
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from internal air sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelA, ModelB, ScipyOptimizationPackage
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from external air sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelA, ModelB, ScipyOptimizationPackage
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform heat transfer"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for real-time temperature data transmission between physical sensors and virtual twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B software execution environment for simulation and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationPackage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy non-linear least squares optimization package for parameter calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireBus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus communication protocol for sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance PCBDesignTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source tools for PCB design incorporating MOSFETs and optocouplers"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OpenSourceRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source hardware/software repository for twin development resources"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for temperature prediction using simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for parameter calibration using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResultInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for safety monitoring and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, AdjustParametersAction
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detection based on temperature predictions"
]

instance AdjustParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heating duration H or waiting duration C parameters in bang-bang control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CalibrationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters from optimization"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system for precise temperature control"
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, MOSFET_Heatbed, MOSFET_Fan, Optocoupler_Control, PowerSupply, RaspberryPi4Hardware, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, InternalAirTemperatureSensor, ExternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam enclosure with 0.03m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "4A current heatbed for thermal regulation (214×214×3mm polystyrene)"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V airflow fan for temperature uniformity (0.02m³/s airflow)"
]

instance MOSFET_Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "MOSFET for heatbed current control (4A switching)"
]

instance MOSFET_Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "MOSFET for fan power control (12V/24V switching)"
]

instance Optocoupler_Control : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optocoupler for GPIO isolation in PCB control circuit"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Hardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B physical controller hardware"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into GPIO signals through MOSFETs and optocouplers to control hardware components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models, with information flow between physical twin and digital twin via RabbitMQ queues as depicted in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), where the digital twin integrates deployed system models for real-time monitoring, prediction, and optimization after physical deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated against temperature uniformity experiments (Figure 10-12) showing better thermal inertia prediction; assumptions tested via sensor placement experiments, with residual error minimized through non-linear least squares calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for inter-component communication, 1-Wire bus for sensor data transmission, and GPIO-based control signals from Raspberry Pi to PCB hardware."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver all deployed on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with hardware components connected via GPIO and PCB."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety, with controller parameters (LL, UL) enforcing temperature limits to prevent overheating and ensure operational safety."
]
